message:
fix: port ITM metric and summary stretch to public/index.html (#182)

Server serves dashboard/public/index.html, not dashboard/index.html.
PRs #175-179 edited the wrong file. Ports:
- avg fix time stat in Governor grid with sparkline
- formatFixTime helper
- summary line CSS stretch (white-space: normal, width: 100%)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
